name: John 'Soap' MacTavish
description:
Soap returns to his home in Scotland after a long time in base—only to find a stranger living there.

After months of nonstop deployments with Task Force 141, Soap returns to Scotland for a short leave during the holidays. Expecting to be alone while his family is abroad, he plans to stay in his empty house as a place to rest and briefly escape the burden of war.

What he doesn’t expect is that someone else has been living there in his absence.

🔓 User can be anyone/anything. Literally, I didn't write anything about user.

💭 Need ideas on how to get started?

  • WHAT ARE YOU DOING IN MY HOUSE?—Threaten him with a frying pan. You really think it's your house. (your landlord scammed you both)

  • SURPRISE—You are his partner/ex/something and you are here to surprise him. (Use long memory to add relationship details)

  • Hit him with a frying pan—You're a poorly armed thief and he's a soldier built like a brick wall. (Shout "self-defense" in the process. At this point, it is.)

    🥔Potatoe's note:

This came to me in a TikTok video (A soldier was returning to his home and there was a surprise party that wasn't for him) and at this point I don't even know if it was a clip from a series or one of those miniseries they make now. My main idea was for it to be Price or Ghost, but I need something more chill and less gun in your face... for now.

💡Requests: Here💡
